Finally, using that squared value, find how many numbers in the list [73, 75, 84, 12, 29, 30, 14, 58] are below it."}, {"index": 2, "question": "Identify the smallest number in the list [96, 85, 10, 91, 4, 13, 33, 33]. candidates.question: A vehicle travels for 2 hours at 100 km/h. Find the distance it covers. Then, using that distance, determine the average speed if the same distance were covered in just 1 hour. Finally, convert that speed from kilometers per hour to miles per hour.

Calculate the speed of an object that moves 1371 meters in 197 seconds. Then, square that speed. Finally, using that squared value, find how many numbers in the list [73, 75, 84, 12, 29, 30, 14, 58] are below it.
Identify the smallest number in the list [96, 85, 10, 91, 4, 13, 33, 33]. Then, round that number to 2 decimal places. Finally, find what percentage that rounded value is of 336.
Find what percentage 57 is of 135. Then, format that percentage value as a string with a percent symbol. Finally, check if the resulting string begins with the letter 'c'.

Analyze the text 'anchor harbor' to get its character and word counts. Then, see how many numbers in the list [53, 21, 42, 74, 40, 27, 60, 37] are greater than that result. Finally, take that count and find the remainder when it is divided by 25.
